award_name: Manufacturing and Associated Industries and Occupations Award MA000010
status: PREVIEW — machine-validated from FWO Pay Guide; gated behind manufacturing_preview flag, not GA
source: Fair Work Ombudsman Pay Guide MA000010, published 16 Oct 2025
coverage_note: General manufacturing only. Does NOT cover vehicle manufacturing (Schedule B of MA000010).
minimum_engagement_note: To be sourced from the MA000010 award text; not in the Pay Guide.
notes: General manufacturing classifications C14-C2(b) plus professional/technical, junior, apprentice, trainee and cadet streams.
Supervisor/Trainer/Coordinator is a relational (percentage) classification, modelled separately.
Shift-loading column mapping to be confirmed against the award text.
